proof_boundary: Reports are shareable preparation artifacts with citations and blocked claims; they are not approval, legal advice, customs advice, buyer validation, supplier verification, payment activation, or launch approval.

blocked_claims.label: Responsibility path recorded
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Ask buyer/importer who is importer of record and which Incoterm applies; route to freight/legal review if needed.
blocked_claims.reason: Do not treat missing or unreviewed Incoterms as a legal responsibility decision.

blocked_claims.label: Origin evidence collected
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Attach certificate of origin or origin-supporting documents and route to scoped review.
blocked_claims.reason: Do not say origin is confirmed from a country name or source route.

blocked_claims.label: Document fields extracted as draft
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Ask the user to confirm extracted fields, then route the packet to the correct reviewer lane.
blocked_claims.reason: Do not treat parser output as authenticity, completeness, or compliance proof.

blocked_claims.label: Supplier evidence collected
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Request supplier registration, export ability, product docs, certificates, inspection, and prior-shipment evidence.
blocked_claims.reason: Do not say supplier verified or recommended.

blocked_claims.label: Tariff confirmed
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Obtain a qualified customs review or authoritative ruling evidence.
blocked_claims.reason: Tariff confirmed remains blocked until authoritative tariff/ruling evidence and qualified review exist.

blocked_claims.label: CFIA approved
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Attach dated CFIA/AIRS result or permit evidence and qualified reviewer finding.
blocked_claims.reason: CFIA approved remains blocked until official permit/admissibility evidence and qualified review exist.

blocked_claims.label: Buyer validated
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Collect dated buyer evidence; directory rows are lead sources only.
blocked_claims.reason: Buyer validated remains blocked until dated buyer response, meeting, LOI, PO, or paid-order evidence exists.

blocked_claims.label: Supplier verified
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Collect supplier proof and route to a scoped reviewer.
blocked_claims.reason: Supplier verified remains blocked until registration, export ability, product evidence, certificates/inspection, and reviewer assessment exist.

blocked_claims.label: Customs ready
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Resolve importer of record, Incoterms, source freshness, and broker/customs review.
blocked_claims.reason: Customs ready remains blocked until broker/customs review and required import/export evidence exist.

blocked_claims.label: Shipment approved
blocked_claims.next_valid_move: Use the packet for preparation only; final shipment decisions require qualified professionals and owner approval.
blocked_claims.reason: Shipment approved is not supported by this product scope.
